prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document specifically pertains to regulations applicable in the UK, but marine equipment regulations are reserved matters in Scotland, meaning they are governed by UK-wide legislation rather than devolved Scottish law. Therefore, while it may inform stakeholders in Scotland, it does not specifically apply to Scotland alone.
